summary: Expanded consent visibility in the Alignment Report and improved coverage.

updates.title: Consent-Only Patient Visibility
updates.body: Every patient with a HIPAA consent record now appears in the Consent Alignment Report — even if they don't have a patient status, prescription, referral, or dispense on file. Consent alone is enough to surface a patient.

updates.title: Consent Tabs in Alignment Report
updates.body: HIPAA and Program Consent are now displayed as in-page tabs in the Consent Alignment Report, making it easier to review consent status without switching views.

updates.title: Misalignment Filter Toggle
updates.body: A dedicated toggle on the Alignment Report lets you filter to only patients with a consent misalignment, making it faster to prioritize outreach.

updates.title: Misalignment Indicators in Consent Evidence Drawer
updates.body: The Consent Evidence Drawer now surfaces "In Review" status and misalignment indicators inline, so you can assess and act on issues without switching views.

updates.title: Multiple Authoritative Sources
updates.body: The Alignment Report now shows all authoritative data sources and their individual consent status side by side for each patient.

updates.title: Inline Review Expiry
updates.body: Consent reviews recorded inline now expire automatically, keeping the report current without any manual cleanup.

updates.title: Simplified Data Source Filter
updates.body: The Hub and SP data source consent filters are now combined into a single control on the Alignment Report.

updates.title: Consent Dates per Source
updates.body: Consent Given, Consent Expiry, and Review Expiry dates are now surfaced per source in the Alignment Report.

updates.title: Consent In Review Notifications
updates.body: Email digest alignment notifications now include items with "Consent In Review" status.

updates.title: Breadcrumb Navigation Access
updates.body: Specialty Pharmacy users no longer see a 403 error when navigating to the Consent Clearinghouse breadcrumb from the Alignment Report.
